name: Cherry-Plum Slump
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine the fruit (2 cups sliced pitted prunes and 1 cup pitted sweet cherries), 1/2 cup of sugar, and 1/4 cup water.
2. Bring the mixture to boiling; reduce heat.
3. For the dumplings, stir together flour, remaining sugar (1/4 cup), baking powder, cinnamon, and salt in a separate bowl.
4. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
5. Add milk and stir just to moisten.
6. Spoon the dough in 6 mounds atop the hot filling.
7. Cover and simmer for about 15 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the dumplings comes out clean.
8. Serve warm. Makes 6 servings.
